title: Jeremy's Stash
subtitle: Plugins and packs I built and maintain — my own picks. Most ship as a standalone repo you can clone directly.

items.name: Databricks Cost Leak Hunter
items.description: Audits a Databricks workspace for real-dollar cost leaks — idle clusters, jobs on the wrong compute, overprovisioning, the Photon premium — and emits a CFO-grokkable, dollar-ranked FinOps report. Every confirmed figure comes from the customer's own system.billing.usage, never an estimate. The headline skill of the 24-skill Databricks pack.

items.name: Box Cloud Filesystem
items.description: Transparent cloud storage for AI agents. Two modes: auto-sync hooks on Write/Edit, or explicit Box CLI operations with safety guardrails.
